blocks.text: To: Operational Review team; cc Jacob Andersen, Chief Financial Officer, {{fact:f:E-2019-001.client}}
Fieldwork starts {{fact:f:E-2019-001.start}}. This memo sets the workstreams, owners, and the first two weeks so nobody is guessing. Read it before the kickoff call; bring questions, not surprises.

items: 1. Production flow: baseline the schedule, walk the floor, quantify downtime drivers. Owner: Jenna Wiley.
2. Purchasing and inventory: pull twelve months of purchase and stock data, flag slow movers. Owner: Lisa Hernandez.
3. Order-to-cash: map quote through collection, time each handoff. Owner: Lisa Hernandez, with client staff support.

blocks.text: Ground rules for the client site: we are guests. Schedule interviews through Mr. Andersen's office, confirm every data pull in writing, and file everything in the engagement folder the same day you collect it.

Next steps: Lisa circulates the data request list this week. I will confirm the interview calendar with the client. First internal check-in is at the end of week one; what changed and what it costs, one page, no decks.
